## Summary

The progress bar was stuck at ~40% after Phase 1A chunks finished because no `completed_units` updates existed between chunk completion (40%) and Phase 2 start (55%). Users clicking Refresh saw no movement for several minutes during Track C synthesis, story layer assembly, and the Phase 2→3 transition.

Added intermediate progress milestones so the bar advances through these previously invisible phases:

| Milestone | `completed_units` | User-facing message |
|---|---|---|
| Track C / Pass 3A done | 43 | Building story analysis |
| Story layer assembled | 47 | Assembling story layer |
| Phase 2 complete → Phase 3 queued | 75 | Scoring complete — preparing synthesis |

## Scope

- **Touches:** `lib/evaluation/processor.ts` — progress JSONB updates at three phase transition points
- **Does NOT touch:** Frontend poller, API endpoint, DB schema, field names, or any user-facing component code

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

- Low risk — only adds `completed_units` and `message` fields to existing progress update objects
- The monotonic ratchet in the frontend ensures progress never goes backward even if these values are slightly out of sequence
- Both happy-path (Pass 3A success) and degraded-path (Pass 3A timeout) get the 43% bump

---

No-Pipeline-Impact: N/A — this IS the pipeline; it adds progress reporting at existing transition points without changing execution flow
